2.seasonStats: Active in Ligue 1 as of Feb 2026 (on loan at FC Lorient)
2.clubStanding: On season-long loan at FC Lorient (Ligue 1) since Jul 29, 2025
2.notes: Left-footed centre-back from Kaolack, Senegal. Product of Diambars FC academy. Joined Bayer Leverkusen in June 2025 for €3M from Swedish club BK Häcken. Currently valued at €4.7M. Five-year contract through 2030. On loan at Lorient for 2025-26 campaign gaining regular Ligue 1 minutes. Promising young defender with clear pathway through elite club.
